home.subtitle: AsanaoConnect is the matchmaking platform connecting Mauritian employers with qualified Malagasy candidates, built to international HR and legal compliance standards.

onboarding.router.title: Setting up your account…
onboarding.router.description: We're finalising your profile. If nothing happens within a few seconds, refresh the page.
onboarding.router.help: If the issue persists, contact the AsanaoConnect team.
onboarding.banner.restored: Resuming where you left off. Your previous answers have been restored.
onboarding.candidate.cardDescription: Tell us about you so we can match you with the best offers.
onboarding.fields.dobHelper: You must be at least 18 years old.
onboarding.fields.phoneHelper: Enter your number with or without the leading 0 — we add +261 automatically.
onboarding.errors.dobMin18: You must be at least 18 years old
onboarding.languages.intro: Self-assess your level. You can also take a quick AI test — the score will be updated automatically.
onboarding.skills.intro: Add the skills that best describe what you can do. Press Enter to add.
onboarding.sectors.intro: Pick the sectors you'd like to work in. You can add your own.
onboarding.cv.intro: Upload your CV (optional). PDF, PNG, JPG or WEBP — up to 10 MB. We'll try to pre-fill your profile from it.
onboarding.cv.extractedFmt: Pre-filled {skills} skill(s) and {sectors} sector(s) from your CV. Review the earlier steps before submitting.
onboarding.cv.aiUnavailable: AI extract unavailable; you can still finish without it
onboarding.enterprise.cardDescription: A few details and we'll set up your hiring workspace.

marketing.legal.cookies.metaDescription: Which cookies AsanaoConnect uses and why. No advertising or cross-site tracking cookies.
marketing.legal.cookies.title: Cookie Policy
marketing.legal.cookies.intro: We keep cookies to the strict minimum required to run the platform. We set no advertising or cross-site tracking cookies.
marketing.legal.cookies.functional.title: Cookies we use
marketing.legal.cookies.cols.name: Cookie
marketing.legal.cookies.rows.clerk.purpo: Authentication session issued by Clerk to keep you signed in.
marketing.legal.cookies.thirdParty.title: Third-party cookies
marketing.legal.cookies.thirdParty.body: No advertising or tracking cookies are set. Our sign-in module (Clerk) may set authentication cookies from the clerk.accounts.dev domain — strictly to keep you signed in.
marketing.legal.cookies.choices.title: Your choices
marketing.legal.cookies.choices.body: All cookies listed here are strictly necessary to operate the platform, so there are no optional cookies to refuse. You can delete them from your browser at any time; you will then be signed out.
marketing.aide.metaDescription: Frequently asked questions and contact for AsanaoConnect candidates and companies.
marketing.aide.title: Help center
marketing.aide.subtitle: The questions we get asked most often.
marketing.aide.faq.q1.a: Yes. Profile creation, matching and administrative support are free for candidates. Our revenue comes from companies.
marketing.aide.faq.q2.q: How long does it take to find a job?
marketing.aide.faq.q2.a: The average time from profile creation to actual departure is 14 days for Mauritius, 18 days for Réunion, 22 days for Seychelles. It depends on the sector and your availability.
marketing.aide.faq.q3.q: How do you verify candidates' identity?
marketing.aide.faq.q3.a: Official ID + scanned diplomas + phone verification. Our team reviews every profile before it becomes visible to companies.
marketing.aide.faq.q4.a: Mauritius, Réunion and Seychelles as hiring destinations. Madagascar for sourcing candidates.
marketing.aide.faq.q5.a: An advisor follows you for the first 90 days. You have access to a dedicated support channel in the app.
marketing.aide.faq.q6.q: How do I delete my account?
marketing.aide.faq.q6.a: From your profile, Settings → Delete account. Deletion erases your data under the terms set out in our privacy policy.
marketing.aide.cta.title: Didn't find your answer?
marketing.aide.cta.body: Write to us — we reply within 24 business hours.
marketing.guides.candidat.metaDescriptio: The AsanaoConnect candidate journey step by step: profile, matching, departure.
marketing.guides.candidat.title: From sign-up to departure
marketing.guides.candidat.subtitle: Everything you need to know before applying.
marketing.guides.candidat.s1.title: Create your profile (10 min)
marketing.guides.candidat.s1.body: Identity, experience, spoken languages, target sector, preferred countries. You can save midway and resume later.
marketing.guides.candidat.s2.title: Verify your documents (24–48 h)
marketing.guides.candidat.s2.body: Our team verifies your identity and diplomas. You get an email as soon as it is validated.
marketing.guides.candidat.s3.title: Receive matches
marketing.guides.candidat.s3.body: Our engine cross-references your profile with open offers. Each match is scored from 0 to 100 with an explanation.
marketing.guides.candidat.s4.title: Apply in one click
marketing.guides.candidat.s4.body: Your data is shared with a company only after your explicit consent. Until you apply, your name stays hidden.
marketing.guides.candidat.s5.title: Interview and offer
marketing.guides.candidat.s5.body: The company arranges one or two video interviews. If you agree, you receive a formal offer inside the platform.
marketing.guides.candidat.s6.title: Documents, visa, housing
marketing.guides.candidat.s6.body: An advisor supports you with the visa, contract and housing. Your first month on site is closely followed.
marketing.guides.entreprise.metaDescript: The AsanaoConnect employer journey step by step: KYC, offer, hire.
marketing.guides.entreprise.title: Recruit with confidence
marketing.guides.entreprise.subtitle: The full journey, from account creation to onboarding.
marketing.guides.entreprise.s1.title: KYC validation (48 h)
marketing.guides.entreprise.s1.body: Account creation, company identification, validation by our team. A single KYC for all your future offers.
marketing.guides.entreprise.s2.title: Publish your offer
marketing.guides.entreprise.s2.body: Describe the role, skills, languages and country. Our editor guides you so you forget nothing (contract length, housing, flight).
marketing.guides.entreprise.s3.title: Receive scored profiles
marketing.guides.entreprise.s3.body: Each candidate is scored from 0 to 100 against your criteria. PII (name, photo, address) is masked until you start shortlisting.
marketing.guides.entreprise.s4.title: Shortlisting and interviews
marketing.guides.entreprise.s4.body: Flag the profiles you like and contact details unlock. You can run video interviews directly in the platform.
marketing.guides.entreprise.s5.title: Offer and contract
marketing.guides.entreprise.s5.body: Issue a formal offer in the platform. The candidate signs online. Our team assists with the local contract.
marketing.guides.entreprise.s6.title: Onboarding
marketing.guides.entreprise.s6.body: Visa, ticket, housing: joint follow-up with the candidate until day one. You get a check-in at 30 and 90 days after hiring.
marketing.legal.conditions.metaDescripti: General terms of use for the AsanaoConnect platform.
marketing.legal.conditions.title: Terms of use
marketing.legal.conditions.objet.title: Purpose
marketing.legal.conditions.objet.body: These terms govern the use of the AsanaoConnect platform by candidates for labour mobility and by the companies that recruit across the Indian Ocean region.
marketing.legal.conditions.gratuite.body: Profile creation, matching and administrative support are free for candidates. Our revenue comes exclusively from companies.
marketing.legal.conditions.entreprises.b: Mandatory KYC validation before publishing an offer. Compliance with the legal working conditions of the hiring country and with equal-opportunity and non-discrimination rules. Confidentiality of candidate data shared before shortlisting.
marketing.legal.conditions.resiliation.b: You can delete your account at any time from the interface. Deletion erases your data under the terms set out in our privacy policy.
marketing.legal.confidentialite.metaDesc: AsanaoConnect privacy policy, compliant with the Mauritius Data Protection Act 2017.
marketing.legal.confidentialite.title: Privacy policy
marketing.legal.confidentialite.collecte: We collect only the data needed for matching and hiring: identity, professional background, languages, preferred location, and supporting documents (passport, diplomas) for candidates engaged in a recruitment.
marketing.legal.confidentialite.finalite: Candidate–company matching, identity verification, administrative support for departure (visa, contract, housing), and compliance with legal obligations (notably KYC for companies).
marketing.legal.confidentialite.droits.b: Under the Mauritius Data Protection Act 2017 you have the right to access, rectify, erase, object to and port your data. Send your request to {email}; we respond within 30 days.
marketing.legal.confidentialite.conserva: Sensitive documents (passport, medical) are deleted 90 days after the recruitment. Inactive candidate profiles are anonymised after 24 months.
See our Compliance page for the full data lifecycle
marketing.legal.mentions.metaDescription: MG·Work SARL legal notice — publisher, host, publication director.
marketing.legal.mentions.title: Legal notice
marketing.legal.mentions.editor.title: Site publisher
marketing.legal.mentions.editor.body: {legalName}, a limited liability company (SARL) under Mauritian law, registered with the Registrar of Companies of Mauritius under Business Registration Number {brn}. Share capital: {capital}. Registered office: {address}. Operational office: {operational}. Incorporated on {incorporated}.
marketing.legal.mentions.director.title: Publication director
marketing.legal.mentions.director.body: The publication director is {director}, manager of {legalName}. Any request can be sent to the contact address below.
marketing.legal.mentions.hosting.title: Hosting
marketing.legal.mentions.hosting.body: The site is hosted by Vercel Inc., 340 S Lemon Ave #4133, Walnut CA 91789, USA. The database is hosted by Supabase in the Indian Ocean region.
marketing.legal.mentions.contact.title: Contact
marketing.legal.mentions.contact.body: For any legal question, email {email}. For data protection matters, see our privacy policy.
marketing.legal.mentions.ip.title: Intellectual property
marketing.legal.mentions.ip.body: The AsanaoConnect name, logo, platform and content are the property of {legalName} or its licensors. Any reproduction without prior authorisation is prohibited.
marketing.legal.confidentialite.controll: {legalName}, registered office {address}, is the controller responsible for processing your personal data. For any data-protection request, contact our Data Protection Officer at {dpo}.
marketing.legal.confidentialite.subproce: We rely on vetted providers to operate the platform: Clerk (authentication), Supabase (database, Indian Ocean region), Vercel (hosting) and Sentry (error monitoring). Some of these providers are based in the United States, which involves a cross-border transfer of certain data governed by appropriate safeguards.
marketing.legal.confidentialite.automate: Our matching engine produces a compatibility score (0–100) to suggest relevant opportunities. This scoring is decision-support only; no hiring decision is taken automatically, and a person always reviews shortlisting. You can request an explanation of any score.
marketing.legal.confidentialite.authorit: If you believe your rights are not being respected, you may lodge a complaint with the Data Protection Office of Mauritius (dataprotection.govmu.org).
marketing.legal.conditions.liability.bod: AsanaoConnect acts as an intermediary between candidates and companies. We make our best efforts to verify profiles and offers but cannot be held liable for the decisions or conduct of users, nor for events beyond our reasonable control.
These terms are governed by the laws of the Republic of Mauritius. Any dispute relating to their interpretation or performance falls under the jurisdiction of the competent courts of Port-Louis, subject to applicable mandatory provisions.
marketing.legal.conditions.disputes.body: In the event of a dispute, the parties will first seek an amicable solution. You can contact us at {email} to raise any concern before taking any legal action.
marketing.home.metaTitle: AsanaoConnect — Labour mobility between Madagascar and the Indian Ocean
marketing.home.metaDescription: A serious platform connecting Malagasy candidates with employers in Mauritius, Réunion and the Seychelles. Compliant with the Mauritius Data Protection Act 2017.
marketing.home.hero.subtitle: A serious platform that connects Malagasy candidates with employers in Mauritius, Réunion and the Seychelles.

marketing.home.howItWorks.title: One platform, two journeys
marketing.home.howItWorks.subtitle: On the candidate side, you apply in minutes. On the employer side, you receive pre-verified profiles.
marketing.home.howItWorks.candidate.step: Identity, experience, languages, target sector. 10 minutes.
Our engine cross-references your criteria with open positions.
Documents, visa, housing: an advisor stays with you until departure.
marketing.home.howItWorks.enterprise.ste: Describe the role, skills and languages. KYC validation in 48 hours.
Each candidate is scored 0–100. PII is masked until shortlisting.
Interviews, contract, onboarding: our team secures every step.

marketing.home.pillars.verified.title: Verified profiles
marketing.home.pillars.verified.body: Identity, diplomas and authorisations are checked by our team before every match.
marketing.home.pillars.matching.title: Transparent matching

marketing.home.testimonials.title: They found their place
marketing.home.testimonials.t1.quote: The support made all the difference. Documents, visa, housing — everything was ready before I left for Mauritius.
marketing.home.testimonials.t1.name: Tahiry Razafy
marketing.home.testimonials.t2.quote: We receive profiles that are already scored and verified. Our time-to-hire dropped from 6 weeks to 2.
marketing.home.testimonials.t2.name: Camille Léonard
marketing.home.testimonials.t3.quote: My first morning in Réunion, I had my contract, my housing and my residence permit. I've never felt so calm.

marketing.home.faq.title: Your questions, our answers
marketing.home.faq.q1.a: No. Profile creation, matching and administrative support are entirely free for candidates. Our revenue comes from employers.
marketing.home.faq.q2.q: How long does it take to find a job?
marketing.home.faq.q2.a: Average time from signup to departure is 14 days. It varies depending on the sector, your profile and the hiring company's pace.
marketing.home.faq.q3.q: How do you verify candidate identities?
marketing.home.faq.q3.a: ID, diplomas and authorisations are checked by our team in Antananarivo within 48 hours. No offers are forwarded until verification is complete.
marketing.home.faq.q4.a: Mauritius, Réunion and the Seychelles. We're evaluating other Indian Ocean countries based on demand from partner employers.
marketing.home.faq.q5.a: An AsanaoConnect advisor stays with every candidate for the first 6 months on site: housing, contract, integration. If something goes wrong, we step in.
marketing.home.cta.title: Ready to take the leap?
marketing.home.cta.body: Sign up in 5 minutes. No commitment, no hidden fees.
marketing.candidats.metaDescription: Apply to verified jobs in Mauritius, Réunion and the Seychelles. Free signup, dedicated advisor, end-to-end support until departure.
marketing.candidats.hero.subtitle: Apply to verified jobs in Mauritius, Réunion and the Seychelles. A dedicated advisor supports you from application to your first day at work.
marketing.candidats.steps.title: 5 steps, fully supported
marketing.candidats.steps.step1.title: Sign up
marketing.candidats.steps.step1.body: Account created in 5 minutes, SMS verification.
marketing.candidats.steps.step2.title: Profile
marketing.candidats.steps.step3.title: Verification
marketing.candidats.steps.step3.body: Identity and diplomas checked within 48 hours.
marketing.candidats.steps.step4.title: Matches
marketing.candidats.steps.step4.body: Offers ranked and scored against your criteria.
marketing.candidats.steps.step5.title: Departure
marketing.candidats.steps.step5.body: Visa, housing, contract — supported until D-1.
marketing.candidats.benefits.title: What AsanaoConnect changes
marketing.candidats.benefits.subtitle: A platform built for Malagasy candidates, not a copy of a European job board.
marketing.candidats.benefits.b1.title: Free, always
marketing.candidats.benefits.b2.title: Verified jobs
marketing.candidats.benefits.b2.body: Every employer goes through our KYC.
marketing.candidats.benefits.b3.title: Dedicated advisor
marketing.candidats.benefits.b3.body: A real person you can reach, in French or Malagasy.
marketing.candidats.benefits.b4.title: Transparent score
marketing.candidats.benefits.b4.body: You know why you match — or why you don't.
marketing.candidats.sample.description: Permanent · €1,800/month net · Visa, flight and housing covered. Healthcare assistant diploma required. English B1.
marketing.candidats.stories.title: They made the move
marketing.candidats.stories.t1.quote: I was nervous about leaving, especially the paperwork. My advisor handled everything. Today I work in Mauritius and send a bit home each month.
marketing.candidats.stories.t1.name: Tahiry Razafy
marketing.candidats.stories.t2.quote: It's the only platform where the score is explained. I improved my profile (English, certifications) and went from 64 to 84 in two months.
marketing.candidats.stories.t2.name: Naina Andriana
marketing.candidats.faq.title: Your questions
marketing.candidats.faq.q1.a: Nothing. The platform is entirely free for candidates: profile creation, matching, administrative support, departure follow-up. Our revenue comes from employers who hire through AsanaoConnect.
marketing.candidats.faq.q2.a: On average 14 days between signup and departure. The timeline depends on your sector, document verification and the hiring company's schedule.
marketing.candidats.faq.q3.q: What if I don't speak English?
marketing.candidats.faq.q3.a: Many positions are open to French-only speakers. For roles requiring English, we offer quick tests and every listing clearly states the level required.
marketing.candidats.faq.q4.q: Who handles the visa and housing?
marketing.candidats.faq.q4.a: The hiring company covers the visa and the flight. Housing is provided or subsidised depending on the role. Your AsanaoConnect advisor coordinates every step until you arrive.
marketing.candidats.cta.title: Your next job is waiting.
marketing.candidats.cta.body: Create your profile in 5 minutes. Free, no commitment.
marketing.entreprises.metaDescription: Hire from Madagascar with confidence: verified and scored profiles, employer KYC in 48 hours, Mauritius DPA 2017 compliance.
marketing.entreprises.hero.subtitle: Receive pre-verified, scored profiles. We handle identity, diplomas, work permits and onboarding.
marketing.entreprises.why.title: International hiring, without the risk
marketing.entreprises.why.w1.title: Compliance included
marketing.entreprises.why.w1.body: Employer KYC, candidate identity verification, work authorisations. Everything is traced and audit-ready.
marketing.entreprises.why.w2.title: Explained matching
marketing.entreprises.why.w2.body: You see the score, but also the reasons: skills, languages, sector, mobility. No black box.
marketing.entreprises.why.w3.title: Local team
marketing.entreprises.why.w3.body: Our team in Antananarivo and Port-Louis follows every case — not a chatbot, a human.
marketing.entreprises.process.title: From job posting to day one
marketing.entreprises.process.step2.body: Job description written with you, multilingual.
marketing.entreprises.process.step4.body: Visa, contract, travel: we handle it.
marketing.entreprises.cases.title: They hire with AsanaoConnect
marketing.entreprises.cases.c1.quote: We had a problematic receptionist turnover. AsanaoConnect delivered a stable team in 4 months.
marketing.entreprises.cases.c2.quote: Post-departure follow-up changes everything: our newcomers stay, unlike with our historic channels.
marketing.entreprises.pricing.title: A plan for every size
marketing.entreprises.pricing.subtitle: From one-off hiring to a continuous pipeline.
marketing.entreprises.pricing.t1.name: Starter
marketing.entreprises.pricing.t2.name: Business
marketing.entreprises.pricing.t3.name: Enterprise
marketing.entreprises.cta.title: Get 3 free profiles in 7 days.
marketing.conformite.metaDescription: Mauritius Data Protection Act 2017 compliance, PII masked by default, regional hosting. Compliance by construction.
marketing.conformite.hero.subtitle: AsanaoConnect is compliant with the Mauritius Data Protection Act 2017. Every data flow — candidate, employer, payment — is traced, encrypted and auditable.
marketing.conformite.pillars.title: What protects candidates and employers
marketing.conformite.pillars.p1.title: Data minimisation
marketing.conformite.pillars.p1.body: We collect only what is strictly necessary for matching and hiring. Sensitive documents (passport, medical) are deleted 90 days after the hire.
marketing.conformite.pillars.p2.title: PII masked by default
marketing.conformite.pillars.p2.body: Candidate names, addresses and photos are masked to employers until a shortlist has been initiated. You only see what helps you decide.
marketing.conformite.pillars.p3.title: Full audit log
marketing.conformite.pillars.p3.body: Every access to candidate data is logged: who, when, why. Candidates can view their access log from their account.
marketing.conformite.pillars.p4.title: Regional hosting
marketing.conformite.pillars.p4.body: All data is stored in Port-Louis and replicated to Saint-Denis. No data leaves the Indian Ocean region without an explicit request.
marketing.conformite.lifecycle.title: What happens, step by step
marketing.conformite.lifecycle.s1.body: The candidate enters their data. Explicit consent per use case.
marketing.conformite.lifecycle.s2.body: Identity and diplomas checked by our team. Documents encrypted at rest.
marketing.conformite.lifecycle.s3.body: The engine computes a score based on weighted, auditable criteria.
marketing.conformite.lifecycle.s4.body: PII is revealed to the employer after shortlist acceptance.
marketing.conformite.lifecycle.s5.body: Contract signed. Sensitive documents are deleted within 90 days.
marketing.conformite.lifecycle.s6.body: Minimum data retained for 5 years for fiscal compliance, then deleted.
marketing.conformite.dpo.title: Have a question or a report?
marketing.conformite.dpo.body: Our DPO answers any access, rectification or deletion request within 72 business hours.
marketing.conformite.faq.title: Compliance & security
marketing.conformite.faq.q1.a: In Port-Louis (Mauritius), with replication to Saint-Denis (Réunion). No data leaves the Indian Ocean region without an explicit, logged request.
marketing.conformite.faq.q2.q: How long do you keep my documents?
marketing.conformite.faq.q2.a: Sensitive documents (passport, medical) are deleted 90 days after the hire. Minimum data needed for fiscal compliance is kept for 5 years, then deleted.
marketing.conformite.faq.q3.a: Only the employers you apply to, and only after you accept a shortlist. Name, address and photo remain masked until then.
marketing.conformite.faq.q4.q: How do I delete my account?
marketing.conformite.faq.q4.a: From your dashboard under Settings, or by emailing dpo@mgwork.io. Deletion is effective within 72 business hours, excluding data we are legally required to keep.
marketing.tarifs.metaDescription: Always free for candidates. Employer plans tailored to each hiring cadence.
marketing.tarifs.hero.subtitle: Always free for candidates. Billed to employers only.
marketing.tarifs.t1.name: Start-up
marketing.tarifs.t2.name: Business
marketing.tarifs.t3.name: Enterprise
marketing.tarifs.matrix.title: Every feature, in detail
marketing.tarifs.faq.title: Pricing questions
marketing.tarifs.faq.q1.a: A percentage of the hired candidate's annual gross salary, billed only when the hire is confirmed. It's our alignment of interests: we win when you hire successfully.
marketing.tarifs.faq.q2.q: Can I change plans during the year?
marketing.tarifs.faq.q2.a: Yes, at any time. Upgrading takes effect immediately; downgrading applies at the next billing cycle.
marketing.tarifs.faq.q3.a: Never. The platform is entirely free for candidates. Our revenue comes solely from employers hiring through AsanaoConnect.
marketing.tarifs.faq.q4.a: Monthly or annual billing, by card or SEPA transfer. Success fees are billed when a hire is confirmed, separately from the subscription.
marketing.tarifs.faq.q5.a: None for monthly plans — cancel any time. Annual plans commit to 12 months in exchange for a 15% discount.
marketing.tarifs.cta.title: Start with 3 free profiles.
marketing.tarifs.cta.body: No card required. Personalised demo within 48 hours.
